---
title: "History of the Apostolic Church, with a General Introduction to Church History"
---

## History of the Apostolic Church, with a General Introduction to Church History

**Author:** The Rev. Philipp Schaff
**Date:** 1853
**Imprint:** New York: Scribner

### Notes

Originally written and published in German.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
